proposal.name: increased-stochastic-heun-edm-nfe20
proposal.hypothesis: Increase stochasticity beyond the best run to test if higher noise injection further improves sample diversity and lowers FID, exploring the upper bound of beneficial stochasticity.
proposal.timestep_or_noise_schedule: edm discretization with linear sigma schedule, same as baseline
proposal.update_rule: stochastic heun with increased noise injection
proposal.stochastic_updates: enabled with S_churn=60, S_min=0.1, S_max=80, S_noise=1
proposal.budget_allocation: maximum number of Heun steps under the fixed NFE budget, same as baseline
